title: Repair Anvil
body:
[![Sparked Host](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1330912431496495165/1490018985675198534/Artboard_2-1.png?ex=69d287d1&is=69d13651&hm=fa99fc9a0f45b09a7ef09ae91ba8f79d8cd7e3b1a06fd73b17010a9561bbfad1&)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3220)

# 💻 Downloads > You can download **Repair Anvil** in Modrinth, Curseforge and PlanetMinecraft! [![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ee01197a4d521e02d4372ad14c55f03c30f14d.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/repair-anvil/versions) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00fafdd884771c3d6ae7652d56db4d8a97ee6f3b.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/repair-anvil) --- # 🔨 Repair Anvil > **Tired of throwing away damaged anvils? Now you can fix them.** > A simple datapack that lets you repair damaged and chipped anvils by dropping Iron Ingots on top of them. No crafting tables, no commands — just toss the ingot and watch it get repaired on the spot. --- ## ⚙️ How does it work? Drop an **Iron Ingot** on top of a **Damaged** or **Chipped Anvil** and it will automatically be repaired to the next stage. A lava particle effect and a sound will play to confirm the repair. - 🪨 Damaged Anvil → Chipped Anvil - ⚒️ Chipped Anvil → Anvil --- ## 📋 Requirements | | Info | |---|---| | **Pack Format** | 61 | | **Minecraft** | 1.18+ | --- ## 👤 Created by **EdonMe Studios** Lead Dev: **SlibJpg** ---
